programme.desc: Vani, Aakash's former lover, returns to him and reveals that he is the father of her child. However, things go awry when he rejects her claim and seeks help from his colleague Anjali.

programme.title: Aankhen
programme.desc: After being sacked from his position as a bank manager, a temperamental man plots revenge by orchestrating a robbery, enlisting three unlikely accomplices.

programme.title: 2 States
programme.desc: Krish and Ananya decide that they will not get married until they can win their parents' approval, but cultural differences between the families pose a problem.

programme.title: Teri Baaton Mein Aisa Uljha Jiya
programme.desc: A robotics engineer on the quest to find his ideal partner, falls in love with an intelligent female robot mistaking her for a real woman in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Queen
programme.desc: Rani is devastated after her fiancé leaves her just before the wedding. Undeterred, she decides to go on their honeymoon alone where she gets pulled out of her comfort zone and rediscovers herself.

programme.title: Dangal
programme.desc: Mahavir Singh Phogat, a former wrestling champion, dedicates himself to transforming his daughters, Geeta and Babita, into elite wrestlers.

programme.desc: Dhak Dhak

programme.title: Ok Jaanu
programme.desc: Adi and Tara are ambitious people who fall in love after meeting at a wedding. They decide on a no-strings-attached live-in relationship, but doubt their decision when their careers pull them apart.

programme.desc: Milkha Singh, an Indian athlete, overcomes many agonising obstacles in order to become a world champion, Olympian and one of India's most iconic athletes.

programme.title: Drishyam

programme.title: Jeena Isi Ka Naam Hai
programme.desc: Alia, an aspiring writer, marries a brutal and abusive prince to put an end to her family's misery. She runs away from him and starts a new life when he orders someone to kill their unborn girl child.
